title: Hermes Agent Desktop + FREE APIs: This is ACTUALLY ONE OF THE BEST AGENT APPS!
summary: Hermes Agent Desktop is a graphical interface for the Hermes Agent framework that enables session management, skill configuration, messaging integrations, scheduled task automation via cron jobs, multi-agent coordination, and model provider selection. The platform supports multiple messaging platforms including Slack, Discord, and Telegram, and integrates with model providers such as Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama.
